metadata.description: Deep Suite — structured development, wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, document gardening, and harness diagnostics plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: deep-work
plugins.description: Evidence-Driven Development Protocol — emits envelope-wrapped session-receipt + slice-receipt + handoff + compaction-state; non-implement dangerous-command denylist + phase-guard hook golden test + skill metadata 3rd-person triggers + slice DAG depends_on/cluster_id contract + M3 envelope writer/handoff docs (v6.6.3+)

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-managed markdown wiki — emits envelope-wrapped index.json (multi-source aggregator) + 5 envelope-aware markdown command sites + scan-vault hook golden + .pending-scan stale-recovery test + wiki-schema skill description trimmed to fit 1024-char cap (v1.5.3+)

plugins.name: deep-evolve
plugins.description: Autonomous Experimentation Protocol — emits envelope-wrapped evolve-receipt + evolve-insights + reverse handoff + compaction-state with identity-gated chain extraction + protect-readonly hook golden + session stale-recovery test (v3.3.2+)

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Independent Evaluator — emits envelope-wrapped recurring-findings.json + envelope-aware session-receipt consumer + /deep-review-loop promoted from a slash command to a `user-invocable: true` skill for Codex / Copilot / Gemini CLI / Agent SDK parity (review↔respond auto-iteration with identical §0–§9 protocol) + Codex per-call timeout 900s (v1.6.0+)

plugins.name: deep-docs
plugins.description: Document gardening agent — emits envelope-wrapped last-scan.json + plugin-dev validator round-1 followup (size-warning audit-only reclassification + 4+sub-prompt garden UX + path_check_enabled provenance emit) (v1.2.1+)

plugins.name: deep-dashboard
plugins.description: Cross-plugin harness diagnostics + suite telemetry — emits envelope-wrapped harnessability-report.json + envelope-aware collector + 16-metric aggregator (all M4-core post-M5.5: 3 M5-activated handoff/compaction + 1 M5.5-activated per-plugin test coverage from manifest mirror) + JSONL/markdown/OTLP exporters + catalog-drift CI guard + plugin-validator follow-ups (LICENSE, tests workflow, version-sync guard, activation-form skill descriptions) (v1.3.4+)
